session.model.dialog.reasoningEffort.des: Sent as provider reasoning.effort. Low uses the model template path that avoids opening a think block when supported.
turn.hook.requestReceived.stopped.messag: The request-received hook stopped the turn.
turn.hook.contextPrepared.stopped.messag: The context-prepared hook stopped the turn.
turn.hook.toolCalled.stopped.message: The tool-called hook stopped the turn.
turn.hook.toolResultsCollected.stopped.m: The tool-results-collected hook stopped the turn.
turn.hook.responsePrepared.stopped.messa: The response-prepared hook stopped the turn.
turn.loopDetection.stopped.message:
A repetitive work loop was detected, so the current turn was stopped.

{reason}
turn.iterationLimit.emptyResponse.messag: The agent reached the tool iteration limit ({maxIterations}) and could not produce a final response.
turn.iterationLimit.system.message: The agent has reached the {maxIterations} tool-iteration limit. Do not call tools. Provide the final user-facing assistant response now, summarizing what was completed and any remaining issue.
protocol.sessionGrant.unavailable.error: Session is not attached to this socket.
protocol.session.alreadyRunning.error: Session is already running; interrupt it before sending another request.
protocol.projectPath.outsideWorkspace.er: projectName must name a direct workspace child folder.
protocol.session.createProjectMismatch.e: Session create project identity does not match this request.
protocol.skillList.projectRequired.error: Skill list requires a negotiated project or an attached session id.
protocol.session.renameUnavailable.error: Session is not available for this rename request.
protocol.session.deleteUnavailable.error: Session is not available for this delete request.
protocol.session.attachUnavailable.error: Session is not available for this attach request.
protocol.session.attachProjectMismatch.e: Session project identity does not match this attach request.
protocol.sessionGrant.required.error: Session is not attached to this socket.
protocol.projectConfig.required.error: projectName is required in one project.configure message.
web.projectPath.mismatch.error: Project folder name does not match the requested project.
web.sessionInput.socketRequired.error: Session input must be sent through an attached WebSocket session.
web.sessionInterrupt.socketRequired.erro: Session interrupt must be sent through an attached WebSocket session.
